title: Version 5.6 — Batch Intelligence
summary: **Patch ladder:** Codenames `Void` → `Bloom` per minor (`.0`–`.9`) — see patch table below.
flowcharts:
flowchart TD
    stageNode["5.6.0 Batch Intelligence — AI job processors"]
    contract["Contract"]
    service["Service"]
    surface["Surface"]
    data["Data"]
    ops["Ops"]
    releaseGate["Release gate"]

    stageNode --> contract
    stageNode --> service
    stageNode --> surface
    stageNode --> data
    stageNode --> ops
    contract --> releaseGate
    service --> releaseGate
    surface --> releaseGate
    data --> releaseGate
    ops --> releaseGate

flowchart LR
    submit["Job submit"]
    queue["Kafka + workers"]
    aiProc["AI processor"]
    response["job_response metadata"]

    submit --> queue
    queue --> aiProc
    aiProc --> response
micro_gate: **Patch intent bands:** `.0` charter, `.1-.2` scaffold, `.3-.5` hardening, `.6-.8` integration, `.9` freeze/handoff.
